face.text: Acne rosacea, with violet papules on nose; worse in the spring. Acne in young people

dosing.notes: Tincture, two to four drops daily in water. In diabetes, three drops three times a day in a glass of water

keynotes.text: color="#800000">ARSENICUM BROMATUM Bromide of Arsenic Has proven a great anti-psoric and anti-syphilitic remedy. Herpetic eruptions, syphilitic excrescences, glandular tumors and indurations, carcinoma, locomotor ataxia, and obstinate intermittents, and diabetes are all greatly influenced by this preparation.
"Acne rosacea, with violet papules on the nose. Diabetes mellitus" (Hansen). Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main
